description: Judge-facing deterministic presets and stamps used by the native app story.

lenia_presets.name: Orbital Field
lenia_presets.description: Spiral seed distribution exposing rotating gradients and soft kernel transport.

lenia_presets.name: Twin Organisms
lenia_presets.description: Mirrored masses showing how one rule can diverge into distinct living forms.

lenia_presets.name: Coral Drift
lenia_presets.description: Branching seed path emphasizing ridge growth and boundary competition.

lenia_presets.name: Kernel Ring
lenia_presets.description: Circular mass bands making radial neighborhood sampling visible.

lenia_presets.name: Sparse Soup
lenia_presets.description: Low-density random mass for testing self-organization.

lenia_presets.name: Dense Bloom
lenia_presets.description: High-density mass testing saturation, turbulence, and collapse.
